Alice in Wonderland

Game Boy Color version in a single HTML launcher

Rabbit Hole Quiz: every 10 seconds Score: 0 Question: 0/15
Questions will now pop up automatically every 10 seconds. Click Focus Game, then click Press Start or press Enter to begin playing.
Down the Rabbit Hole Checkpoint Question 1 of 15

Move: Arrow Keys
A / B: Z / X
Start: Enter
Select: Shift
Tip: Questions appear automatically every 10 seconds. After each answer, click Continue the Adventure to return to the game.
